name: Easy 10-minute Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat.
2. Add tomato sauce to the pan.
3. Fill a can twice with water from the tap and add it.
4. Mix in the large packet of seasonings thoroughly while adding the ingredients.
5. Let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes.
6. For thicker consistency, mix masa flour with water and add slowly.
7. If you prefer it hotter or spicier, add a small amount or all of the cayenne powder according to your taste.
